Index

A

addNewProduct() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Allows the admin to add a new product to the store.
addProductToYourCart() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Adds a product to the shopping cart.
applyDiscountToProduct() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Allows the admin to apply a discount to a specific product.

D

displayMenu() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Displays the main menu options for the Online Store System.
displayProducts() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Displays all the products available in the store, grouped by their categories.
displaySearchResults(List<Product>) - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Displays the results of a product search.

I

isAdmin() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Checks if the currently logged-in user is an admin.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
The main method serves as the entry point for the Online Store System.
manageCompositeProducts() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Manages composite products in the online store system.

O

onlineStore - package onlineStore
 
OnlineStoreSystem - Class in onlineStore
The OnlineStoreSystem class is the main entry point for an online store simulation.
OnlineStoreSystem() - Constructor for class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
 

P

proceedToPayment() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Processes the payment for the items in the user's shopping cart.

R

removeProductFromYourCart() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Removes a specified product from the user's shopping cart.
reviewProduct() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Allows the user to review a product.
reviews() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Displays all product reviews.

S

searchProducts() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Allows users to search for products in the store.
signOut() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Signs out the current user.

U

userLogin() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Handles the user login process.

V

viewCart() - Static method in class onlineStore.OnlineStoreSystem
Views the current user's shopping cart.
